name: ErrorFrameCount
title: ErrorFrameCount
description: Returns the number of Error Frames on channel x since start of measurement.
return: Number of Error Frames on channel x since start of measurement.

example.code:
write ("Number of error frames on CAN1 = %d", 
 CAN1.ErrorFrameCount);

availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
— (since version 8.0) (deprecated, replaced by predefined system variable sysvar::_Statistics::CANn::,for details see system variables for statistics.)
— (since version 8.0) (deprecated, replaced by predefined system variable sysvar::_Statistics::CANn::,for details see system variables for statistics.)
